channel.title: Mozilla Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Mozilla Corporation (mozilla).

item.title: CVE-2026-16361 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox ESR 115.38 and Firefox ESR 140.13
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox ESR 115.37 and Firefox ESR 140.12. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability…

item.title: CVE-2026-16360 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox ESR 115.38, Firefox ESR 140.13 and Firefox 153
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox ESR 115.37, Firefox ESR 140.12 and Firefox 152. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This v…

item.title: CVE-2026-16412 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox ESR 140.13 and Firefox 153
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox ESR 140.12 and Firefox 152. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fix…

item.title: CVE-2026-16411 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox 153
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 152. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16408 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Integer overflow in the Audio/Video: Playback component
item.description: Integer overflow in the Audio/Video: Playback component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16406 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Mitigation bypass in the Networking component
item.description: Mitigation bypass in the Networking component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16405 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Information disclosure in the Networking: WebSockets component
item.description: Information disclosure in the Networking: WebSockets component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153 and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.title: CVE-2026-16404 · 7.4 HIGH 🌩️ — Spoofing issue in Firefox for Android
item.description: Spoofing issue in Firefox for Android. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16403 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Spoofing issue in the Address Bar component
item.description: Spoofing issue in the Address Bar component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16402 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Integer overflow in the Graphics: ImageLib component
item.description: Integer overflow in the Graphics: ImageLib component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16401 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Privilege escalation in the Data Loss Prevention component
item.description: Privilege escalation in the Data Loss Prevention component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16400 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Information disclosure in the DOM: Security component
item.description: Information disclosure in the DOM: Security component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16399 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Site isolation issue in the DOM: Navigation component
item.description: Site isolation issue in the DOM: Navigation component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16398 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Site isolation issue in the Graphics component
item.description: Site isolation issue in the Graphics component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16397 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Clickjacking issue in the WebExtensions component in Firefox for Android
item.description: Clickjacking issue in the WebExtensions component in Firefox for Android. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16395 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Integer overflow in the Audio/Video component
item.description: Integer overflow in the Audio/Video component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16394 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Mitigation bypass in the DOM: Security component
item.description: Mitigation bypass in the DOM: Security component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16359 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Incorrect boundary conditions in the Audio/Video: GMP component
item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Audio/Video: GMP component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153, Firefox ESR 115.38, and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.title: CVE-2026-16393 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics: WebGPU component
item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics: WebGPU component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.description: Information disclosure in the Storage: IndexedDB component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153 and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.description: Mitigation bypass in the Enterprise Policies component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153 and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions, integer overflow in the Libraries component in NSS. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.description: Sandbox escape in the DOM: Networking component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.description: Site isolation issue in the Networking component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153 and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.description: Information disclosure due to uninitialized memory in the Graphics: WebGPU component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.description: Privilege escalation in the DOM: Content Processes component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153 and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.description: Other issue in the DOM: Copy & Paste and Drag & Drop component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the JavaScript: WebAssembly component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153 and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.description: Sandbox escape due to invalid pointer in the Disability Access APIs component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.description: Information disclosure in the Graphics: ImageLib component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153, Firefox ESR 115.38, and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.description: Invalid pointer in the DOM: Bindings (WebIDL) component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153, Firefox ESR 115.38, and Firefox ESR 140.13.
